texto: If I stood you in front of a man, pressed the cold metal of a gun into your palm and told you to squeeze the trigger, would you do it?''No, sir.''Are you sure?''Of course, sir. No ways!''What if I then told you we'd gone back in time and his name was Adolf Hitler? Would you do it then? Would you?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jason Wallace que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “If I stood you in front of a man, pressed the cold metal of a gun into your palm and told you to …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, thought-provoking, would, com foco em reflexao.
